name: Android Release Workflow
summary: Refactored to use reusable workflow pattern. The workflow now calls release-core.yml with parameters instead of running steps inline. Callers must update references from android-release.yml to use the new inputs: branch, environment, pilot_branch.

name: Lokalise String Pull
summary: New automated workflow added to pull Lokalise strings on PR creation targeting develop. Replaces manual pull process. Uses LOKALISE-AMERICAS-API-KEY from Azure Key Vault. Triggers on PR open and synchronize events.

name: Release Core (Reusable)
summary: New reusable core workflow extracted from android-release.yml. Accepts inputs: branch (string), environment (uat|prod), pilot_branch (optional string). All release workflows should call this instead of duplicating steps.

name: Auth Config Deploy
summary: Updated to support MSAL v5 configuration format. auth_config.json schema changed for v5 compatibility. Added validation step to check Azure AD B2C tenant URL format before deploying.

name: Rewards API Smoke Test
summary: Updated smoke test workflow to target Rewards API v2 endpoints. Old v1 endpoints removed. Added new test cases for balance endpoint that now returns tier information. Uses SHELL-REWARDS-V2-CLIENT-ID secret.
